results.content:
View organization page for DualStream

10 followers

Stream to desktop and mobile at the same time — without wrestling your software.
That's the whole idea behind DualStream. 
Open the app. Pick where you want to go. Hit go live. That's the setup. No wrestling with settings for an hour before you can create. No stitching together three tools and hoping they cooperate. Just a clean path from "I want to stream" to "I'm streaming." 
Your Desktop audience and your Mobile audience both get the moment — from one simple setup on your end. 
The best tool is the one that gets out of your way. 
We wanted going live to feel that easy, so you can spend your energy on the part that actually matters: your content and your community.

The largest amateur baseball and softball platform names WIN Reality its Official VR Training Partner, putting game-speed pitch training in athletes' hands anytime, anywhere.
Three things stand out:
→ Perfect Game produces nearly 10,000 events a year
→ WIN's Blast Motion sensors come to designated showcase events for live performance data
→ 92% of players selected in the 2025 MLB Draft had played Perfect Game events
"Every athlete deserves access to great development opportunities," said WIN Reality CEO Chris O'Dowd.

results.title: Multistream to Twitch, YouTube, TikTok, & More
results.content:
## Multistream from any streaming software

Streamlabs Multistream works across all your setups — available in Streamlabs Desktop, Mobile, and the OBS Plugin with Ultra.  
  
Prefer a different streaming app? No problem. Set it up through your Streamlabs Dashboard and use your custom RTMP URL and stream key to go live from any software.

Streamlabs Desktop and Mobile app UI shots with arrows to indicate Stream Shift

## Switch devices mid-stream with Stream Shift

Start your stream on PC, switch to your mobile device or another computer, and shift back again all without ending your stream, losing viewers, or splitting up your VOD.

## Frequently asked questions [...] ## Let our servers do the work

With most other tools, your internet has to upload each stream separately, draining bandwidth and risking quality crashes.  
  
With Streamlabs, you send a single stream to us, and our servers forward it to each platform without straining your setup.

Screenshot of Streamlabs Desktop with live stream on TikTok on side

## Free multistreaming with Dual Output

Give your viewers the best experience by setting up separate horizontal and vertical canvases with Dual Output — available in Streamlabs Desktop.  
  
Stream to one platform per canvas, completely free.

## Get Streamlabs Desktop - go live in minutes!

Go Live toggle in Streamlabs Desktop with platform icons

## Easy to set up and go live everywhere [...] ## Frequently asked questions

Streamlabs Multistream is a feature that allows you to broadcast your live stream to multiple platforms at once. With Multistream you can go live to Twitch, YouTube, TikTok, Kick, Facebook, X(Twitter), and RTMP destinations simultaneously. We process your stream on our servers so you can expand your reach without straining your PC. You can use Streamlabs Multistream with Streamlabs Desktop, Plugin for OBS, or any other streaming software via the Dashboard.

Streamlabs Multistream is an Ultra feature. If you want to multistream for free, you can go live to one vertical and one horizontal destination at the same time with Dual Ouput, no subscription required.

Onlyfans Streaming [...] ### 📶 Bandwidth) and Network Limitations

Multistreaming eats bandwidth. If your upload speed can’t keep up, you’ll get choppy video, lag, or even stream failures.

Solution:

Make sure your upload speed is at least 5 Mbps per platform. If that’s not possible, reduce your bitrate to 3,000–6,000 kbps and lower your resolution to 720p. Tools like OBS Studio let you manually adjust these settings.

## FAQ

Do I need to pay to multistream?

No—many tools offer free plans, but advanced features like branding, analytics, or streaming to more than 2 platforms may require a paid upgrade.

Is multistreaming from a phone reliable?

It’s possible, but not ideal. Mobile devices often struggle with stability and quality, especially on weaker networks.

Why does my stream lag or buffer?

SplitCam does not support mobile streaming, meaning users need to rely on a laptop or desktop to stream.  Additionally, it doesn’t have any built-in encoding tools, so you’ll need to rely on third-party encoding software.

### Pricing:

SplitCam is free to download and use. SplitCam is a way to live stream to multiple platforms for free. It also allows you to split the screen with others using webcams at the same time.

Multistreaming is a process of live streaming video content to different social media platforms simultaneously. [...] Image Source: mirrorfly.com

Unlike other entries on this list, MirrorFly is not a platform, but a solution to build live streaming platforms. It is one of the easiest options businesses choose to build their own streaming platforms, rather than going for a third-party, where features can be limited and there’s no control of the streams, its security and storage. You can simply integrate the API & SDK and get live streaming launched on your app, just the way you want it.

#### What are the Key Features of MirrorFly

MirrorFly is inarguably the best in-app streaming solution for businesses,
